item.title: Causal Forest for Heterogeneity Analyses
item.description: A step-by-step guide for practitioners Estimate conditional average treatment effects (CATE) with causal forest (Athey et al., 2019)[1] using replicaiton data from an educational randomized intervention on grit (Alan et al., 2019). With emphasis on replicability and consistent models parameter tuning out-of-bag prediction visualized heterogeneity To be published March 2020. Some visualizations may look like: References [1] Athey, S., Tibshirani, J., & Wager, S. (2019). Generalized random forests. The Annals of Statistics, 47(2), 1148-1178.
